description: A logistics specialist plans the move of a drilling rig from one well pad to another, aiming to minimize time and cost.

nodes.task_description: Identify all the components of the rig that need to be moved and their weights/dimensions.

expected_outcome.expected: A complete list of all rig loads is generated.

nodes.task_description: Plan the optimal sequence for disassembling, moving, and reassembling the rig components.

expected_outcome.expected: A detailed rig move schedule is created.

nodes.task_description: Schedule the required trucks and cranes and obtain any necessary road permits for oversized loads.

expected_outcome.expected: All third-party logistics and permits are secured for the planned move date.
